outputs.description: Vulnerability description PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.cve_url Link to the PANW Security Advisories page
outputs.name: PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.description

outputs.description: Base score of CVE PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.cvss_severity Base severity of CVE (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL)
outputs.name: PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.cvss_score

outputs.description: Threat Score of the CVE PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.cvethreatseverity Threat Severity of CVE (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL)
outputs.name: PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.cvethreatscore

outputs.description: CVSS Vector indicating metrics of attack PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.cvss_table Metrics of the vulnerability
outputs.name: PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.cvss_vector_string

outputs.description: List of affected products, their versions and changes introduced with fixes PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.cveproductstatus List of affected products with platform information and fixed versions
outputs.name: PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.affected_list

outputs.description: Affected products defined by CPE PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.published_date Date
outputs.name: PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.cpes

outputs.description: PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.last_updated_date Date Date when it was last updated on the advisories page
outputs.name: Date when it was published to the advisories page

outputs.description: Solution provided for the CVE PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.workaround Workaround for the CVE
outputs.name: PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.solution

outputs.description: Required configurations for exploit PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.exploits Known exploits of this vulnerability in the field
outputs.name: PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.configurations

outputs.description: Impact description of the vulnerability PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.external_cve_list If input CVE is a PAN-SA advisory then list of related non-PANW CVEs
outputs.name: PANOSSecurityAdvisories.Advisory.impact
